name: AI旅行+本地生活APP
description: AI旅行+本地生活双场景平台，A轮融资1800万美元，创始团队来自 Copilot 和 Bing Chat 核心团队。
descriptionEn: AI-powered travel and local lifestyle platform, Series A with $18M funding, founding team from Copilot and Bing Chat core team.

name: AI动画创作工具
description: 全球首款专业级动画创作 AI Agent 工具，锦秋+高瓴押注，定位「AI 时代的皮克斯」。产品内置艺术总监、编剧、分镜、角色、场景、动画、音效 7 个专业 Agent 模拟真实动画工作室协同，用户一句话或一张图就能全自动出成片，解决传统 AI 视频「角色跑偏、只能出单镜头」的痛点，主要服务于自媒体、漫剧、广告、教育等内容生产者。
descriptionEn: Worlds first professional animation creation AI Agent tool. Backed by Jinqiu and Gaorong, positioned as the Pixar of the AI era. Product includes 7 professional Agents (Art Director, Writer, Storyboard, Character, Scene, Animation, Sound) simulating real animation studio collaboration. Users can generate complete animated films with a single text or image, solving traditional AI video pain points like character drift and single-shot limitations. Serving content creators in self-media, comic ads, advertising, and education.

name: RobotEx 机器人
description: 国内领先的人形机器人公司，核心团队来自清华、MIT，已完成C轮融资。
descriptionEn: Leading humanoid robot company in China, core team from Tsinghua University and MIT, Series C funding completed.

name: AIThink 大模型
description: 专注通用大模型研发，目标打造中国的OpenAI，已获得红杉、高瓴投资。
descriptionEn: Focusing on general-purpose LLM development, aiming to become China's OpenAI, backed by Sequoia and Hillhouse.

name: DriveAuto 智驾
description: L4级自动驾驶解决方案提供商，与多家主机厂达成量产合作。
descriptionEn: L4 autonomous driving solution provider, with mass production partnerships established with multiple OEMs.

name: Personal AGI
description:
打造属于每个人的 Personal AGI
我们的愿景是 Personal AGI（个人通用人工智能）——为每个人、每个团队打造专属的 AI Agent OS，让智能融入真实的社交与工作场景，而非困在一个聊天框里。
这款产品是面向个人与社交场景的 AI Agent OS——创作、分享、探索一切；我们从模型层、Agent Harness 到应用层进行全栈联合优化与创新——因为我们相信，Personal AGI 只会诞生于这样垂直整合的全栈创新之中。
累计融资超 2000 万美金； 账上净现金超 5000 万美金；
descriptionEn:
Building Personal AGI for Everyone

Our vision is Personal AGI (Personal General Artificial Intelligence) — to build an exclusive AI Agent OS for every individual and team, bringing intelligence into real social and work scenarios, rather than confining it within a chat box.

This product is an AI Agent OS for personal and social scenarios — creating, sharing, and exploring everything; we perform full-stack joint optimization and innovation from the model layer, Agent Harness to the application layer — because we believe Personal AGI can only emerge from such vertically integrated full-stack innovation.

Raised over M in total financing; over M in net cash on hand.
location: 旧金山湾区/香港/日本/新加坡
locationEn: San Francisco Bay Area / Hong Kong / Japan / Singapore

name: 全球化旅游平台
description:
全球化综合出游服务平台
核心业务以东南亚地区为主

按 2024 年商品交易总额计算，为亚太最大的泛区域体验平台，连接旅行者与全球目的地体验服务商家，提供景点门票、特色活动、交通票务等非标准化旅游产品。

红杉中国、经纬创投、博裕资本等知名机构多轮投资，融资总额近 10 亿美元。

专注目的地体验预订服务，核心市场覆盖东南亚，为亚太地区领先的泛区域体验平台，业务遍及全球 4,200 余个目的地，提供约 31 万种体验项目。
descriptionEn:
Global Comprehensive Travel Service Platform
Core business focused on Southeast Asia

Based on 2024 GMV, we are the largest pan-regional experience platform in Asia-Pacific, connecting travelers with global destination experience service providers, offering non-standardized travel products such as attraction tickets, special activities, and transportation tickets.

Sequoia China, Matrix Partners, and Boyu Capital have invested in multiple rounds, with total financing approaching  billion.

We focus on destination experience booking services, with core markets covering Southeast Asia. We are a leading pan-regional experience platform in the Asia-Pacific region, with business spanning over 4,200 destinations globally and offering approximately 310,000 experience projects.
